name: Cream Custard Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry by mixing flour, butter, lard, and cold water.
2. Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) or Gas Mark 6.
3. Pour boiling cream into a pie plate or cake tin with a loose bottom; bake for 15-20 minutes until lightly browned.
4. Mix egg yolks, cream, milk, sugar, saffron water, and salt in a bowl.
5. Pour custard mixture into the pastry case.
6. Bake at 160°C (325°F) or Gas Mark 3 for about 45 minutes, or until set in the center.
7. Let cool before serving.
